title: Plutarch, Moralia: On the Control of Anger
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: On the Control of Anger.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: On the Control of Anger.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'On the Control of Anger': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
